summary.intent: Add a mention that the project is open source on the home page, linking to the GitHub repository.
summary.outcome: Added an 'Open source' link to the GitHub repository in the footer of the EmptyState component, displayed alongside the existing 'Powered by Packmind' link. Change was committed as 26cd5b3.

repo: The home page is implemented as the EmptyState component at frontend/src/components/EmptyState.tsx, not a dedicated page or index file.
A pre-commit hook runs automatically on commit: 1329 tests, lint on 290 files, and TypeScript type checking must all pass.
There is a constants.ts file that was also checked during the commit diff, suggesting shared constants may live there.

code.finding: Footer section contains external links styled consistently and separated by bullet points. The 'Powered by Packmind' link was already present; 'Open source' was added alongside it using the same pattern.

workflow: Pre-commit hooks enforce test, lint, and type-check gates — no manual CI step needed before committing.
The user delegates commit message authoring to the assistant and uses the bare 'commit' command as a trigger.
